ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-03-2023 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-06-2023 Continued To Apr-03-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Nov-01-2022 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-12-2022 Continued To Feb-06-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Oct-31-2022 Continued To Dec-12-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Laurie Shigekuni, via Zoom, for Mark L. Chan, Personal Representative.

The court notes its position regarding the incomplete report submitted earlier this year and of the delays in resolving this matter. Counsel reports that she has a final petition and waivers ready submit to the court and should be filed by today. The court advises counsel that it will be continuing this status hearing to Dec-21-2022 but all the issues previously raised in the tentative ruling from August are to be addressed by Nov-30-2022 or the court will consider suspending the Administrator and sanctions may be imposed. Counsel requests that the petition she intends to file be specially set for Dec-21-2022. Upon consideration, the court grants counsel's request to specially set her pending petition on the previously mentioned date.

The Status Hearing is continued to Dec-12-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. The clerk's office will be instructed to set counsel's petition for hearing on the same date.

Judge: Hon. Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Cristobal. Not Reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Sep-12-2022 Continued To Oct-31-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. An Order to Appear will be issued to Administrator Mark L. Chan and Attorney Laurie Shigekuni to appear on Oct-31-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why the issues with the incomplete report have not been addressed. No appearance will be required on Oct-31-2022 if the issues with the incomplete report are addressed or if a petition for final distribution is filed by Oct-21-2022. The Status Hearing is continued to Oct-31-2022.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Cristobal. Not Reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
